race.comment: FINGERS HUNTER (9) back in trip when she demolished a good field over 1200m at Randwick in Highway class with the 59kg. Kept fresh and since fitted with a 900m Scone trial placing. Talented on her day and can put these away if the breaks go her way. CLEAR THINKING (3) Group placed mare and Kosciuszko winner resuming. Unlikely to be screwed down for this with the one trial and look for Williams to weave his magic from the wide draw. Go close. CHIDIAC (8) undefeated in two first-up starts and meets CLEAR THINKING better at the weights after her narrow third in the Kosciuszko last Spring. Fitted with a sharp 1000m trial win and gets her chance. UPWARDLY MOBILE (5) underrated mare who returned a good set of figures first-up with a slick 3.5 len win over 1200m at Scone in C4 grade. Undefeated at the trip and will relish the tempo. Each way. PRIDE TO FOLLOW (10) resumes after racing without luck over the Queensland Winter. Primed with the two trials and drawn to take a hand in the finish.
